title: musa cheesmanii
intro: Musa cheesmanii, also known as the Cheesman's banana or Cheesman's plantain, is a species of plantain in the genus Musa. It is a type of wild banana native to the Himalayas and parts of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Musa cheesmanii include relieving digestive issues, reducing fever, and treating skin conditions, and it is often prepared as a tea or taken in capsule form for its herbal benefits.
